name: buddy
description: Buddy — a calm day companion. Web app (index.html) wrapped in a Tauri v2 Mac menu-bar shell.

scripts.icons:mac: cd src-tauri/icons && rm -rf .car-build && mkdir .car-build && xcrun actool Buddy.icon --compile .car-build --output-format human-readable-text --errors --output-partial-info-plist .car-build/partial.plist --app-icon Buddy --include-all-app-icons --enable-on-demand-resources NO --development-region en --target-device mac --minimum-deployment-target 26.0 --platform macosx && cp .car-build/Assets.car Assets.car && cp .car-build/Buddy.icns icon.icns && rm -rf .car-build && echo 'Regenerated Assets.car + icon.icns from Buddy.icon'
scripts.ui:smoke: NODE_PATH=$(npm root -g) npx playwright test scripts/buddy-ui-smoke.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.sync:live: NODE_PATH=$(npm root -g) npx playwright test scripts/buddy-two-device.spec.js --reporter=line
